credentials.name: AHREFS_API_KEY
credentials.purpose: Authenticates calls to Ahrefs v3 API for the Off-Page section (DR, backlinks, referring domains, organic traffic). Required for Off-Page; the section returns `available: False, reason: 'no_key'` per domain if unset. Growisto has a subscription; teammates use the org's shared key.

credentials.name: PAGESPEED_API_KEY
credentials.purpose: Authenticates calls to Google PageSpeed Insights for the Technical section's Core Web Vitals. Optional — falls back to the Suite's hardcoded free-tier key if unset. Set this if you hit quota limits.

notes: Plugin makes outbound HTTPS calls to api.ahrefs.com and pagespeedonline.googleapis.com (both keyed). Also fetches homepages + sitemaps + a few inner pages from the user-supplied domains for on-page / hygiene / GEO scraping. No LLM API calls from scripts — Claude does ALL AI classifications via the SKILL.md workflow. Max 4 domains per run (1 primary + 3 competitors).
